title: HUST-OBC raw dataset
provider: Huazhong University of Science and Technology research team / Scientific Data
access_method: Follow the Scientific Data article data-availability links; do not bulk download until rights and size review.
handling_strategy: Use as candidate large source for 1588 deciphered and 9411 undeciphered character image classes; extract class indexes and source references before raw images.
risk_note: Raw dataset is large and compiled from diverse sources; do not commit original package to regular Git.

title: OBIMD raw multimodal dataset
provider: Key Laboratory of Oracle Bone Inscriptions Information Processing Anyang Normal University and collaborators / Scientific Data / Hugging Face
access_method: Use Hugging Face dataset card and Scientific Data article; do not bulk download raw image files until size review.
storage_hint: external Hugging Face dataset pending review
handling_strategy: Use as candidate large source for image-level, sentence-level and character-level OBI context records; extract metadata and field maps before raw images.
risk_note: Dataset card reports CC-BY 4.0, but raw image package is large and must not be committed directly.

title: EVOBC raw evolution dataset
access_method: Follow linked dataset repositories and paper data availability; do not bulk download until rights and size review.
handling_strategy: Use as candidate source for graph/evolution-chain experiments after source and rights review.
risk_note: Large AI/evolution dataset; not a primary paleographic authority by itself.
